taskTemplate.name: Send Disclosures
taskTemplate.description: Send required loan disclosures to borrower

subTaskTemplate.name: Index
subTaskTemplate.description: Index – Index pulled as of today. Use "Get Index" button.

subTaskTemplate.name: Appraisal Fee Only
subTaskTemplate.description: Appraisal Fee Only – The only fee evidenced is the appraisal fee.

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – All Scores
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – All Scores – All scores for all borrowers from all credit bureaus pulled on the credit report are evidenced on the FACT Act Disclosure. (Be sure to check second borrower pair as well).
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – All Scores

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – Checkboxes
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – Checkboxes – Ensure the 'Material Terms of Credit set by Credit Score' and 'Credit Score for Disclosure Notice' check boxes on the Disclosure Notice are checked when a credit score is available and unchecked when a score is not available.
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – Checkboxes

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – Key Factors
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – Key Factors – Verify that the Key Factors informational text is present for every credit score to be disclosed for all borrowers and all bureaus pulled.
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – Key Factors

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – eConsent
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – eConsent – Verify eConsent is received before sending electronically.
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – eConsent

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – Contact Info
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – Contact Info – Verify email and phone are present before sending electronically.
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – Contact Info

subTaskTemplate.name: FACT Act Disclosure – Ready to Send
subTaskTemplate.description: FACT Act Disclosure – Ready to Send – Ready to Send Disclosure. Mark Done to send electronically. Mark Issue to send via mail (must complete manually).
subTaskTemplate.type: Send Disclosures – FACT Act Disclosure – Ready to Send

subTaskTemplate.name: Home Counseling List
subTaskTemplate.description: Home Counseling List – Provide Home Counseling List to borrower.
